titleStmt.title: SII 27.331: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 331. (A.R. No. 555 of 1929-30.) UPPUNDA, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in afield called ‘Hāḍimane-hola’.

This damaged record in characters of about the 14th century, seems to register a gift of land to Nāraṇa-aḍigaḷu, in the presence of the nāḍu of Uppuguṅḍa and others, by the king Kātarasa of the Aḍiyara-kula. It mentions Kōlarasa and Aṇṇa-sēnabōva.
It is dated the cyclic year Naḷa Māgha-amāvasya, Monday probably corresponding to 1377 A.D., February 8, the being Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sasti samasta prasasti sahitaṁ Aḍiyara kuḷaka
maḷa mārtaṁḍaṁ Aḍiyara kuḷa vaṁsōdbhavanēkāṁgi vī
ra vīrāvatāra vīraśrīge vallabhaṁ bhayalōpadurllabha ripu
karīṁdra kaṁṭhīravaṁ paranārī sahōdaraṁ husivara sū
la kādavaramalla śrī vīra kātarasaru stirarājyaṁ geyyuttira
lu naḷa saṁmvastarada māghamāsa sōmavāra Amāvāseya
lu naṁdatiṁmaṁṇnagaddekō ḍikallana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka
vōduvara baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda mūḍa dēvarabaḷi
yana gaḍiIṁda paḍuva hoḷḷana gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga I
ṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷaguḷḷa makimane nōki niḍi sa
ha kātarasaru kōlarasaru Aṇna sēnabōvana pra
dhā Uppuguṁḍada nāḍeṁṭu mānisara saṁnidhi
yana Aḍigaḷa maga nāraṇa Aḍiga
gi koṭa mūla heṇiṁge dānavāgi yeṟadu
ḷiṁge dharmma mādana vāḍiyalu mūru
haḍiyalu yeraḍu haṇaviṭṭu hosa
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.331 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
